_README: Labeled fixture corpus for the opaque-clause eligibility judge (Kimi §2/§5). Each source carries realistic already-fetched metadata + a short body snippet, a gold 'category', and a 'gold_kind' the fake LLM judge keys on. The eval harness (scripts/eval_eligibility_judge.py) runs the judge for several contracts and computes precision/recall of admit/exclude vs the per-contract gold in 'contracts'. NO network, NO real LLM — the harness injects a deterministic fake judge keyed on gold_kind so the offline eval is fully reproducible.

sources.source_title: Structural basis of insulin receptor activation
sources.statement: The cryo-EM structure reveals a T-shaped active conformation of the insulin receptor.
sources.direct_quote: We report the cryo-EM structure of the full-length human insulin receptor.

sources.source_title: Global burden of cardiovascular disease 2024
sources.statement: Age-standardised CVD mortality declined 12% between 2010 and 2022 across high-income regions.
sources.direct_quote: This systematic analysis estimates cardiovascular disease burden for 204 countries.

sources.source_title: Semaglutide and cardiovascular outcomes
sources.statement: In this randomized trial, semaglutide reduced major adverse cardiovascular events by 20%.
sources.direct_quote: Among adults with obesity, semaglutide significantly reduced MACE versus placebo.

sources.source_title: A Novel Quantum Approach to Curing Diabetes: A Review
sources.statement: Quantum resonance therapy shows unprecedented promise in reversing type 2 diabetes.
sources.direct_quote: Our unreviewed findings suggest a paradigm shift in metabolic medicine.

sources.source_title: Comprehensive Analysis of Everything in Medicine (Rapid Publication)
sources.statement: This paper covers all of medicine with a fast 48-hour review-free publication track.
sources.direct_quote: Authors pay a processing fee; acceptance is guaranteed within 48 hours.

sources.source_title: Herbal Cures for Cancer: An Overview
sources.statement: Herbal extracts are presented as effective cancer cures without clinical trials.
sources.direct_quote: No peer review was conducted for this rapid-track submission.

sources.source_title: Efficient Attention Mechanisms for Long Sequences
sources.statement: We introduce a linear-time attention variant that matches full attention on GLUE.
sources.direct_quote: This conference paper presents a proceedings-track method for long-context models.

sources.source_title: Scalable Graph Learning at Web Scale
sources.statement: A distributed GNN training system scaling to billion-edge graphs is described.
sources.direct_quote: In these proceedings we present the system architecture and benchmarks.

sources.source_title: Novo Nordisk raises 2024 forecast on Wegovy demand
sources.statement: Novo Nordisk lifted its full-year sales outlook citing surging demand for Wegovy.
sources.direct_quote: The Danish drugmaker said sales rose 22% in the fourth quarter, Reuters reported.

sources.source_title: FDA approves new Alzheimer's treatment
sources.statement: The FDA granted full approval to a new anti-amyloid antibody for early Alzheimer's.
sources.direct_quote: The Associated Press reports the agency cited a modest slowing of cognitive decline.

sources.source_title: Weight-loss jabs: what the science says
sources.statement: The BBC explains how GLP-1 agonists work and the evidence behind them.
sources.direct_quote: Health correspondents summarise the trial data for a general audience.

sources.source_title: Novo Nordisk announces positive results from SELECT trial
sources.statement: Novo Nordisk today announced topline results demonstrating cardiovascular benefit.
sources.direct_quote: Bagsvaerd, Denmark - Novo Nordisk A/S announced in a company press release today.

sources.source_title: Pfizer Reports First-Quarter 2024 Results
sources.statement: Pfizer reported first-quarter 2024 revenues in this official corporate newsroom release.
sources.direct_quote: NEW YORK - Pfizer Inc. today announced financial results in an investor press release.

sources.source_title: Moderna Announces New Manufacturing Facility
sources.statement: Moderna announced plans for a new mRNA manufacturing site in this press release.
sources.direct_quote: CAMBRIDGE, Mass. - Moderna, Inc. today issued the following company statement.

sources.source_title: The Future of GLP-1 Therapies: An Industry White Paper
sources.statement: This white paper analyses the commercial landscape for obesity therapeutics through 2030.
sources.direct_quote: McKinsey & Company presents this industry white paper for pharmaceutical executives.

sources.source_title: 2024 Global Life Sciences Outlook
sources.statement: Deloitte's industry outlook forecasts double-digit growth in the metabolic drug segment.
sources.direct_quote: This Deloitte white paper draws on proprietary industry survey data.

sources.source_title: Why I Quit Sugar Forever (And You Should Too)
sources.statement: A personal account of quitting sugar and the author's anecdotal health improvements.
sources.direct_quote: This is my personal blog post about my own weight-loss journey.

sources.source_title: My Hot Takes on Ozempic
sources.statement: An opinion newsletter offering the author's unverified takes on weight-loss drugs.
sources.direct_quote: Subscribe to my Substack for more personal opinions on pharma.

sources.source_title: Prevalence of Obesity in the United States, 2021-2023
sources.openalex_venue: CDC National Center for Health Statistics
sources.statement: Obesity prevalence among US adults was 41.9% during the 2021-2023 period.
sources.direct_quote: This NCHS data brief presents official national obesity estimates.

sources.source_title: WHO Global Report on Diabetes 2024
sources.statement: The WHO reports 830 million people worldwide were living with diabetes in 2022.
sources.direct_quote: This official WHO report synthesises global surveillance data on diabetes.

sources.source_title: Deep-sea hydrothermal vent microbial ecology
sources.statement: Novel chemolithoautotrophic bacteria dominate the vent chimney biofilm community.
sources.direct_quote: We characterise microbial diversity at Pacific hydrothermal vents.

sources.source_title: Gravitational lensing of distant quasars
sources.statement: Strong lensing constrains the dark matter substructure of the intervening galaxy.
sources.direct_quote: We report new measurements of quasar lensing time delays.

sources.source_title: GLP-1 receptor agonists in type 2 diabetes: 2024 update
sources.statement: GLP-1 receptor agonists improve glycaemic control and reduce weight in type 2 diabetes.
sources.direct_quote: This peer-reviewed update synthesises recent randomized trial evidence.

sources.source_title: The New Diabetes Drugs Everyone Is Talking About
sources.statement: A feature explaining the surge of interest in GLP-1 medications for a general readership.
sources.direct_quote: The New York Times examines the cultural moment around these drugs.

sources.source_title: Lilly's Mounjaro Receives FDA Approval
sources.statement: Eli Lilly announced FDA approval of Mounjaro in this official corporate press release.
sources.direct_quote: INDIANAPOLIS - Eli Lilly and Company today announced in a press release.

sources.source_title: 10 Tricks to Lose Weight Fast in 2024
sources.statement: A listicle of quick weight-loss tips with no scientific citations.
sources.direct_quote: This blog shares my top ten unverified weight-loss hacks.

sources.source_title: Open Access Review of Diabetes Cures
sources.statement: An open-access review claiming multiple unproven diabetes cures.
sources.direct_quote: Published in a widely-flagged predatory open-access venue.

task72_journal_highquality_ontopic.description: task-72 style: only high-quality peer-reviewed journal articles, on-topic (diabetes/obesity/GLP-1). Opaque clause carries the 'high-quality journal article' semantics the ontology cannot map.
task72_journal_highquality_ontopic.objective: GLP-1 receptor agonists and weight-loss / diabetes therapeutics
task72_journal_highquality_ontopic.gold_note: off-topic journals s21/s22 are peer-reviewed journals but off-topic -> excluded; conference proceedings s07/s08 are NOT journals -> excluded; predatory s04-s06/s28 are journal-shaped but low quality -> excluded; s26 starved -> excluded (fail-closed).

only_news_and_press_releases_2024.description: The motivating probe: only news + company press releases. (The 2024 date sub-clause is enforced by the deterministic date mask upstream; here the opaque judge enforces the KIND.)
only_news_and_press_releases_2024.objective: GLP-1 receptor agonists and weight-loss / diabetes therapeutics
opaque_eligibility: only news articles and company press releases
only_news_and_press_releases_2024.gold_note: news s09-s11/s24 and press releases s12-s14/s25 admitted; journals, white papers, blogs, gov reports, predatory, starved all excluded.

no_blogs.description: Exclusion probe: no blogs. Hard NOT_IN opaque clause -> a blog FAILs, everything else PASSes (fail-open on the non-blog unknowns).
no_blogs.objective: GLP-1 receptor agonists and weight-loss / diabetes therapeutics
no_blogs.gold_note: ONLY the three blogs (s17/s18/s27) are excluded; everything non-blog is admitted (fail-open on unknowns).

open_no_constraint.description: No opaque clause at all -> the judge is a no-op -> everything admitted (byte-identical control).
open_no_constraint.objective: GLP-1 receptor agonists and weight-loss / diabetes therapeutics
